items.title: Manhunt under way in South Africa after 12 killed in mass shooting in Johannesburg
items.dek: Another nine people were injured at an informal settlement in Cleveland late on Tuesday.

items.title: Firms charged with manslaughter over deadly Hong Kong fire
items.dek: The Wang Fuk Court blaze last year was the deadliest that Hong Kong had seen in 70 years, killing 168 people.
items.body: The Wang Fuk Court blaze last year was the deadliest that Hong Kong had seen in 70 years, killing 168 people.
